DBStatement.name: Statement
DBStatement.sql: WITH pq_mask AS( SELECT pq1.position, pq1.energy, pq1.energyunit, pq1.posstatus, pq1.mass, pq1.massunit FROM physicalquantity AS pq1 LEFT JOIN physicalquantity AS pq2 ON ( pq1.position = pq2.position AND pq1.creationdate < pq2.creationdate AND pq1.posstatus = 1 AND pq2.posstatus = 1 ) WHERE pq2.creationdate IS NULL ) , v AS ( SELECT valuation,valuationmode,valuationtime FROM valuation WHERE valuation.valuationtime = DATEADD(minute,1,(DATEADD(day,-1,'2021-01-22'))) ) ,vd AS( select valuationdetail, valuation, position, valuetime, begtime, quantitystatus, description, quantity, pricequantity, price, value, marketprice, marketvalue, positionstatus, exposure, pricestatus, priceindex, currency, priceunit, trade, product, futuremonth, contract, company, counterparty, tradebook, marketarea, location, movement, exposuremonth, exposureindex, swaptype, jr_jeracargoref FROM valuationdetail WHERE format(valuationdetail.begtime,'yyyy-MM-dd') BETWEEN DATEADD(month ,-7, '2021-01-22') AND CAST( CAST( YEAR( DATEADD(month,12, '2021-01-22')) AS varchar ) + '/03/31' AS DATE ) AND valuationdetail.quantitystatus <>'PLAN' AND valuationdetail.description NOT LIKE 'From%' AND valuationdetail.company ='JERA' AND valuationdetail.movement= 'false' ) SELECT * FROM vd INNER JOIN v ON vd.valuation = v.valuation INNER JOIN position ON vd.position = position.position LEFT JOIN physicalposition ON vd.position = physicalposition.position LEFT JOIN pq_mask ON vd.position = pq_mask.position WHERE v.valuationmode = 'VaR_3' and position.positiontype <>'INVENTORY'
